_comment: Data-driven approval policy — what needs Chris vs what agents auto-decide. Kapelle Fleet Doctrine 2026-06-29 §'Approval / merge discipline': scope changes (risk=scope), spend over a threshold, external sends, and irreversible domain-data cutovers gate to Chris; everything else, agents decide. Edit this file to change the gate — no code change required. Keywords are case-insensitive substring matches scanned against an item's title/body. Consumed by src/approval-policy/policy.ts (loadApprovalPolicy) and surfaced by GET /decisions/needs-chris (approval_policy block + per-row gate).
